headline: TKO Expands Event Footprint With Arizona Deal And Abu Dhabi Return
summary: TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) announced a multi-year partnership to host UFC, WWE, PBR, and Zuffa Boxing events in Arizona. The company is also planning the return of UFC Fight Night to Abu Dhabi as part of its global live events schedule. These agreements expand TKO's live event footprint across key U.S. and Middle Eastern markets. TKO runs a live combat sports and sports entertainment portfolio built around UFC, WWE, PBR and related properties, with a core focus on ticketed events, media...
